entries.intent: loop over every item in an array
entries.disambiguator: iterate all elements; no early exit

entries.intent: loop over an array with early break
entries.disambiguator: requires early exit from array iteration
iterate FirstIndex..LastIndex inclusive; no early exit

entries.intent: loop over an integer range with early break
entries.disambiguator: requires early exit from integer range loop

entries.intent: loop while a condition is true
entries.disambiguator: generic while loop; wire Condition pin
use the native Branch (UK2Node_IfThenElse) for exec-flow if/else; this macro form is emitted rarely

entries.intent: execute multiple exec branches in order
entries.disambiguator: prefer the native UK2Node_ExecutionSequence; this macro form is emitted rarely

entries.intent: run exec once then never again
entries.disambiguator: emits a bDoOnce_<GUID> bool UPROPERTY; wire Reset pin to allow re-firing

entries.intent: run exec at most N times
entries.disambiguator: emits an int32 DoNCounter_<GUID> UPROPERTY; fires until counter reaches N

entries.intent: gate exec flow with open close toggle enter pins
entries.disambiguator: emits a bGateOpen_<GUID> bool UPROPERTY; Enter fires body only when open

entries.intent: alternate between two exec outputs each call
entries.disambiguator: emits a bFlipFlop_<GUID> bool UPROPERTY; alternates A/B on each fire
pure null/validity check producing IsValid/IsNotValid exec branches; distinct from the pure IsValid function node

entries.intent: choose one of several values by index or bool
entries.disambiguator: conditional expression, not control flow; bool selector yields ternary, int selector yields switch

entries.intent: fire one of N exec outputs in sequence or randomly
entries.disambiguator: emits an int32 MultiGateIndex_<GUID> UPROPERTY; outputs advance per-call
Authority branch runs on server; Remote branch runs on clients

entries.intent: delay execution by a number of seconds
entries.disambiguator: latent: wire 'then' pin rather than authoring timer/delegate nodes
latent: wire 'then' pin rather than authoring timer/delegate nodes
latent: wire 'then' pin rather than authoring timer/delegate nodes

entries.intent: move ai pawn to a world location
entries.disambiguator: latent: wire 'then' pin rather than authoring timer/delegate nodes

entries.intent: move ai pawn to an actor
entries.disambiguator: latent: wire 'then' pin rather than authoring timer/delegate nodes

entries.intent: branch execution on a boolean condition
entries.disambiguator: native UK2Node_IfThenElse; preferred over StandardMacroBranch for exec flow

entries.intent: run multiple exec branches in sequential order
entries.disambiguator: native UK2Node_ExecutionSequence; preferred over the Sequence macro
UK2Node_SwitchEnum; one exec output per enum case plus Default
UK2Node_SwitchInteger; one exec output per literal integer plus Default
UK2Node_SwitchString; emitted as if/else-if chain
UK2Node_SwitchName; emitted as if/else-if chain
V3-3 detection via class name contains 'SwitchGameplayTag'; emitted as if/else-if chain

entries.intent: play or control a timeline component
entries.disambiguator: UK2Node_Timeline; per-exec-input dispatch (Play, PlayFromStart, Stop, Reverse, ReverseFromEnd); Update and Finished pins become callbacks

entries.intent: start an async task proxy action
entries.disambiguator: spawn single UK2Node_BaseAsyncTask; do not declare proxy variables; Claireon picks GUID-suffixed names

entries.intent: call a function on a target object
entries.disambiguator: fallback UK2Node_CallFunction emission; return value promoted to UPROPERTY member when present

entries.intent: dynamic cast an object to a target class
entries.disambiguator: UK2Node_DynamicCast; emits assignment only and promotes CastResult to UPROPERTY member

entries.intent: spawn an actor from a class
entries.disambiguator: UK2Node_SpawnActorFromClass; emits assignment only and promotes SpawnedActor to UPROPERTY member

entries.intent: mark a custom-event point in an exec chain
entries.disambiguator: V4-3: during scope traversal a custom event emits only a comment tag (not a nested function definition); must be checked before generic Event
UK2Node_Event; root of an exec chain; translator scaffold emits a UFUNCTION body
UK2Node_VariableGet; identifier sanitized via SanitizeCppIdentifier (V7-unconnected)
UK2Node_VariableSet; identifier sanitized via SanitizeCppIdentifier (V7-unconnected)

entries.intent: orphan pure node consumed by visited code
entries.disambiguator: V7-orphans and V6-3 closure: pure orphans whose outputs reach visited nodes are inlined, not declared as locals; do not author intermediate local vars, wire pin-to-pin

entries.intent: async task proxy node naming and activation
entries.disambiguator: V7-dupdef + V7-asyncproxy: spawn single UK2Node_BaseAsyncTask; do not declare proxy variables; Claireon picks GUID-suffixed names so header and source stay in sync

pin_default_formats.FHitResult: (FaceIndex=...) or any struct dump containing ,Time= and ,Distance= -- translator substitutes FHitResult()

field_name_aliases.description: Graph and properties tools emit both prefixed and plain-name keys on identity fields. Writers and readers MUST tolerate both; readers SHOULD prefer the prefixed form for logs.
